title: Rampage Jackson vs Sweatergxd controversy explained after MMA legend punches Kick streamer live
summary_full: A party encounter between MMA legend Rampage Jackson and Kick streamer Sweatergxd turned physical after the streamer repeatedly touched Jackson inappropriately, including his groin area. After issuing several verbal warnings and telling him not to touch him again, Jackson threw a punch before leaving the scene, with the incident now circulating widely online.
